TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Latvia, title = Latvia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Latvia} }

S.FORM: Latvia Itini i 57 00 N, 25 00 E, noYoropi ko Latvia. Polong no sekalay i 64,589 sq km "saka 124 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 62,249 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 2,340 sq km " Polong i 1,965,686 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 29.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 54.10%, malo no roma to a sera 16.70%. siyoto O (((Riga)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakacecay ko safaw 18 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Raimonds Vńďjonis , patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 8 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: …ĺatb~via itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~ujo~uro~upi ko~u …ĺatb~via. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((ri*a)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i saka ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u safaw ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i raimo~un…¨~…ģs b~v*jo~unis , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Latvia Itini i 57 00 N, 25 00 E, noYoropi ko Latvia. Polong no sekalay i 64,589 sq km "saka 124 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 62,249 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 2,340 sq km " Polong i 1,965,686 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 29.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 54.10%, malo no roma to a sera 16.70%. siyoto O (((Riga)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakacecay ko safaw 18 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Raimonds Vńďjonis , patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 8 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((ri*a)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i saka ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u safaw ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i raimo~un…¨~…ģs b~v*jo~unis , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
